title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud unveiled its unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform with a no-code/low-code Agent Designer for building multi-agent workflows. The platform includes new Agent Registry and marketplace for component distribution, enterprise governance layer with observability, time-travel debugging, evaluation suite, and managed simulation platform. Features include expanded Agent Development Kit with language support and secure code execution sandbox.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech presents the unified Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, centered on a no-code/low-code Agent Designer for building multi-agent workflows. The platform adds an Agent Registry and marketplace for distributing components, plus an enterprise governance layer that includes observability, time-travel debugging, an evaluation suite, and a managed simulation platform. The expanded Agent Development Kit brings additional language support and a secure code execution sandbox. The release matters because it consolidates agent building, orchestration, distribution, and governance into a single managed stack.
